metadata.description: Trust-attestation skills for Claude agents on the open web. Built claude-first on the TunnelMind verify/preflight API.

plugins.name: tunnelmind-trust
plugins.description: Four trust-decision skills + a reference harness: allow/caution/deny pre-flight, fused Scry x Sigil x GhostRoute identity verdict, claim-vs-conduct key reconciliation, and routing-sovereignty verification — each with a signed receipt.
